recommendations.title: The Adventures of Priscilla, Queen of the Desert
recommendations.overview: Two drag performers and a transgender woman travel across the desert to perform their unique style of cabaret.

recommendations.title: Easy Virtue
recommendations.overview: A young Englishman marries a glamorous American. When he brings her home to meet the parents, she arrives like a blast from the future - blowing their entrenched British stuffiness out the window.

recommendations.title: Eye of the Beholder
recommendations.overview: A reclusive surveillance expert is hired to spy on a mysterious blackmailer, who just may be a serial killer.

recommendations.title: Grease
recommendations.overview: Australian good girl Sandy and greaser Danny fell in love over the summer. But when they unexpectedly discover they're now in the same high school, will they be able to rekindle their romance despite their eccentric friends?

recommendations.title: Mad Max 2
recommendations.overview: Max Rockatansky returns as the heroic loner who drives the dusty roads of a postapocalyptic Australian Outback in an unending search for gasoline. Arrayed against him and the other scraggly defendants of a fuel-depot encampment are the bizarre warrio

recommendations.title: Road Train
recommendations.overview: A supernatural thriller about a group of teenagers menaced by a driver-less train in the Australian outback.

recommendations.title: Crocodile Dundee II
recommendations.overview: Australian outback expert protects his New York love from gangsters who've followed her down under.

recommendations.title: Red Dog
recommendations.overview: The legendary true story of the Red Dog who united a disparate local community while roaming the Australian outback in search of his long lost master.

recommendations.title: Hannah Gadsby: Nanette
recommendations.overview: The Australian comedian Hannah Gadsby is taking an anti-comedy stance in her newest special.

recommendations.title: The Best Man
recommendations.overview: Mercenaries seize control of a remote resort hotel during a wedding and it's up to the best man, the groom and their drunken best friend to stop the terrorists and save the hostages.
